title: Hoehnea scutellarioides

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Bioactive constituents of Hoehnea scutellarioides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to make herbal teas and infusions, which are commonly consumed to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health.
